title: rubus elongellus
intro: Rubus elongellus, also known as the Himalayan Raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family native to the Himalayas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus elongellus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Rubus elongellus can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
